scripts.dev:backend: cd ../.. && uv run mentalmodel ui --frontend-dev-url http://127.0.0.1:5173
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:remote: cd ../.. && uv run mentalmodel remote up --output-dir /tmp/mentalmodel-remote --port 8765 --frontend-dev-url http://127.0.0.1:5173
